title: farsetia divaricata
intro: Farsetia divaricata, also known as the spreading farsetia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly found in tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Farsetia divaricata include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antidote for poisoning. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties.
